### Build Something Real | Join the Edison Pitch Contest [Learn More →](http://thomasedisonpitch.org)

THE OFFICIAL SITE OF THOMAS ALVA EDISON

# The Man Who Built The Modern World

# Inventor, icon, and entrepreneur, Thomas Edison, turned bold ideas into everyday realities, from lighting our homes to capturing sound and film, leaving a legacy that powers creativity and industry around the globe.

[Read Edison’s Biography](https://www.thomasedison.org/brief-biography)

## Measure The Impact

##### 1,093 patents

filed in his lifetime

##### 1 in 4 Jobs

trace back to his inventions

##### 1200+ Films

earliest contribution

##### 170k+ Followers

still following on social

[Explore His Inventions](https://www.thomasedison.org/inventions)

Electric Lighting

1879

Recorded Sound

1877

Motion Pictures

1891

Batteries

1903

## A Legacy You Can License

Edison’s name, image, and trademarks are recognized around the world. From fashion to film, companies license Edison to connect with timeless values: innovation, perseverance, and creativity.

His legacy is more than history — it’s a brand that still sparks progress.

[Work With Us](https://www.thomasedison.org/licensing)

### Partners in Innovation

###### “Opportunity is missed by most people because it is dressed in overalls and looks like hard work.”

## Shaping the next generation of problem-solvers

The Thomas Edison Pitch Contest helps students think like innovators — testing ideas, failing forward, and building solutions that matter. Edison’s method of persistence still shapes how the next generation learns to change the world.

[Register for Free](http://thomasedisonpitch.org)

### Partners in Inspiration

## Preserving the world’s first R&D lab

From Edison’s labs at West Orange to the Glenmont estate and the Black Maria film studio, we’re helping preserve the spaces where innovation began. These aren’t just historic sites — they’re reminders of what’s possible when imagination meets hard work.

[Learn More](https://www.thomasedison.org/glenmont)

### Invested in History

##### 100% Profits

supports our mission

##### $13M+ Invested

preserving the labs

##### 76+ Years

stewarding Edison

“Our greatest weakness lies in giving up. The most certain way to succeed is always to try just one more time.”

### Light Up Your Inbox

Get stories, updates and exclusive drops from the official Thomas Edison site delivered straight to your inbox.
